---
title: "Referências técnicas"
subtitle: "Materiais de referência sobre configuração de servidores"
author: "Carlos de Moura"
date: "2026-04-19"
categories: [nginx, shiny server, servidor]
draft: false
toc: false
---

## Referências

* https://www.nginx.com/resources/wiki/start/
* https://www.nginx.com/resources/wiki/start/topics/tutorials/config_pitfalls/
* https://wiki.debian.org/Nginx/DirectoryStructure
* https://docs.posit.co/shiny-server/
* https://shiny.posit.co/r/articles/share/shiny-server/
* https://docs.posit.co/shiny-server/#host-a-directory-of-applications
* https://cliente.hostgator.com.br/dominios/dns-wizard
* https://suporte.hostgator.com.br/hc/pt-br/articles/30810621770387-Como-configurar-o-DNS-de-um-dom%C3%ADnio
* http://nginx.org/en/docs/
* https://fedoraproject.org/wiki/Nginx
